# Sticky

Makes an element stick to the viewport when scrolling past it.

## Import

```jsx
import { Sticky } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| top | `string \| number` | - | Top offset when stuck |
| bottom | `string \| number` | - | Bottom offset when stuck |
| zIndex | `string \| number` | - | Z-index when stuck |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Content to make sticky |

## Usage

```jsx
<Sticky top="0" zIndex="sticky">
  <Box bg="white" p={4} shadow="sm">
    Sticky Header
  </Box>
</Sticky>
```

## Features

- CSS `position: sticky` implementation
- Configurable offset and z-index
- Works within scroll containers
